'''''Marvel Movie Showcase'' 1''' collects the first three issues from the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] series of comics; it has a publishing date of [[November]] [[1982]] and a $1.25 cover price.

This issue reprints the cover to [[Star Wars (1977) 1|''Star Wars'' (1977) 1]], but with different text.

This is a comics adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 1|''Star Wars'' (1977) 1]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 2|''Star Wars'' (1977) 2]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 3|''Star Wars'' (1977) 3]]
